name: Strawberry-Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sweet red wine, cranberry cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the boiling water over the gelatin; stir until the gelatin is dissolved.
2. Stir in the wine and cold water. Refrigerate until slightly thickened.
3. Shape the cream cheese into 18 balls. Roll each ball in nuts.
4. Mix the strawberries and sugar.
5. Pour 1/3 cup of the thickened gelatin into a 6-cup ring mold.
6. Arrange the cheese balls evenly in the gelatin in the mold.
7. Spoon the strawberries over the cheese balls.
8. Carefully pour the remaining gelatin over the strawberries.
9. Refrigerate until firm. Serve 6 servings, each containing approximately 190 calories.
